revision.text:
'''癸亥'''（みずのとい、きがい）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて60番目(最後)で、前は[[壬戌]]、次は[[甲子]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は水、[[十二支]]の五行は水で、[[五行思想#比和|比和]]である。
==癸亥の年==
==癸亥の日== ===[[選日]]=== 癸亥の日は[[八専]]の最終日である。

revision.comment: Programmatically generating so that if this gets imported to wikipedia as a draft, the bot will attribute it to Immanuelle and send them g6 warnings
revision.text: #redirect[[en:癸亥]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''癸亥'''（みずのとい、きすいのいのしし、きがい）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの60番目（最後）で、前は[[壬戌]]、次は[[甲子]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[癸]]は陰の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[亥]]は陰の[[水]]で、[[五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和]]である。
==癸亥の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って3が余る年が癸亥の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''癸亥の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[3年]] *[[63年]] *[[123年]] *[[183年]] *[[243年]] *[[303年]] *[[363年]] *[[423年]] *[[483年]] *[[543年]] *[[603年]] *[[663年]] *[[723年]] *[[783年]] *[[843年]] *[[903年]] *[[963年]] | *[[1023年]] *[[1083年]] *[[1143年]] *[[1203年]] *[[1263年]] *[[1323年]] *[[1383年]] *[[1443年]] *[[1503年]] *[[1563年]] *[[1623年]] *[[1683年]] *[[1743年]] *[[1803年]] *[[1863年]] *[[1923年]] *[[1983年]] | *[[2043年]] *[[2103年]] *[[2163年]] *[[2223年]] *[[2283年]] *[[2343年]] *[[2403年]] *[[2463年]] *[[2523年]] *[[2583年]] *[[2643年]] *[[2703年]] *[[2763年]] *[[2823年]] *[[2883年]] *[[2943年]] |}
==癸亥の月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[10月]]が癸亥の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立冬]]から[[大雪]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==癸亥の日== ===選日=== 癸亥の日は[[八専]]の最終日である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みすのとい}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:癸亥]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:癸亥]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:癸亥]]

{{干支}} '''癸亥'''（みずのとい、きすいのいのしし、きがい）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの60番目（最後）で、前は[[壬戌]]、次は[[甲子]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[癸]]は陰の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[亥]]は陰の[[水]]で、[[五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和]]である。
==癸亥の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って3が余る年が癸亥の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''癸亥の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[3年]] *[[63年]] *[[123年]] *[[183年]] *[[243年]] *[[303年]] *[[363年]] *[[423年]] *[[483年]] *[[543年]] *[[603年]] *[[663年]] *[[723年]] *[[783年]] *[[843年]] *[[903年]] *[[963年]] | *[[1023年]] *[[1083年]] *[[1143年]] *[[1203年]] *[[1263年]] *[[1323年]] *[[1383年]] *[[1443年]] *[[1503年]] *[[1563年]] *[[1623年]] *[[1683年]] *[[1743年]] *[[1803年]] *[[1863年]] *[[1923年]] *[[1983年]] | *[[2043年]] *[[2103年]] *[[2163年]] *[[2223年]] *[[2283年]] *[[2343年]] *[[2403年]] *[[2463年]] *[[2523年]] *[[2583年]] *[[2643年]] *[[2703年]] *[[2763年]] *[[2823年]] *[[2883年]] *[[2943年]] |}
==癸亥の月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[10月]]が癸亥の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立冬]]から[[大雪]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==癸亥の日== ===選日=== 癸亥の日は[[八専]]の最終日である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みすのとい}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Water Pig-qq]] [[Category:癸亥]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:癸亥]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Water Pig-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[ja:癸亥]]

==癸亥の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って3が余る年が癸亥の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''癸亥の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[3年]] *[[63年]] *[[123年]] *[[183年]] *[[243年]] *[[303年]] *[[363年]] *[[423年]] *[[483年]] *[[543年]] *[[603年]] *[[663年]] *[[723年]] *[[783年]] *[[843年]] *[[903年]] *[[963年]] | *[[1023年]] *[[1083年]] *[[1143年]] *[[1203年]] *[[1263年]] *[[1323年]] *[[1383年]] *[[1443年]] *[[1503年]] *[[1563年]] *[[1623年]] *[[1683年]] *[[1743年]] *[[1803年]] *[[1863年]] *[[1923年]] *[[1983年]] | *[[2043年]] *[[2103年]] *[[2163年]] *[[2223年]] *[[2283年]] *[[2343年]] *[[2403年]] *[[2463年]] *[[2523年]] *[[2583年]] *[[2643年]] *[[2703年]] *[[2763年]] *[[2823年]] *[[2883年]] *[[2943年]] |}

==癸亥の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って3が余る年が癸亥の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''癸亥の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[3年]] *[[63年]] *[[123年]] *[[183年]] *[[243年]] *[[303年]] *[[363年]] *[[423年]] *[[483年]] *[[543年]] *[[603年]] *[[663年]] *[[723年]] *[[783年]] *[[843年]] *[[903年]] *[[963年]] | *[[1023年]] *[[1083年]] *[[1143年]] *[[1203年]] *[[1263年]] *[[1323年]] *[[1383年]] *[[1443年]] *[[1503年]] *[[1563年]] *[[1623年]] *[[1683年]] *[[1743年]] *[[1803年]] *[[1863年]] *[[1923年]] *[[1983年]] | *[[2043年]] *[[2103年]] *[[2163年]] *[[2223年]] *[[2283年]] *[[2343年]] *[[2403年]] *[[2463年]] *[[2523年]] *[[2583年]] *[[2643年]] *[[2703年]] *[[2763年]] *[[2823年]] *[[2883年]] *[[2943年]] |}

==癸亥の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って3が余る年が癸亥の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''癸亥の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[3年]] *[[63年]] *[[123年]] *[[183年]] *[[243年]] *[[303年]] *[[363年]] *[[423年]] *[[483年]] *[[543年]] *[[603年]] *[[663年]] *[[723年]] *[[783年]] *[[843年]] *[[903年]] *[[963年]] | *[[1023年]] *[[1083年]] *[[1143年]] *[[1203年]] *[[1263年]] *[[1323年]] *[[1383年]] *[[1443年]] *[[1503年]] *[[1563年]] *[[1623年]] *[[1683年]] *[[1743年]] *[[1803年]] *[[1863年]] *[[1923年]] *[[1983年]] | *[[2043年]] *[[2103年]] *[[2163年]] *[[2223年]] *[[2283年]] *[[2343年]] *[[2403年]] *[[2463年]] *[[2523年]] *[[2583年]] *[[2643年]] *[[2703年]] *[[2763年]] *[[2823年]] *[[2883年]] *[[2943年]] |}
==癸亥の月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[10月]]が癸亥の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立冬]]から[[大雪]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==癸亥の日== ===選日=== 癸亥の日は[[八専]]の最終日である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|みすのとい}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの60番目（最後）で、前は[[壬戌]]、次は[[甲子]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[癸]]は陰の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[亥]]は陰の[[水]]で、[[五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和]]である。

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904914]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Pig [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Pig|kanji=癸亥|romaji=mizunoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=guǐhài|w=kuei-hai|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ xaɪ̯|y=gwai2 hoi6|j=gwai2 hoi6|ci=kʷɐi hɐi|mc=kjwɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ɢəʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Pig also known as 癸亥''' (mizu no toi, kisui no inoshishi, kigai) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Pig (癸亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: kigai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyehae (계해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Hợi

[[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904914]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Pig [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Pig|kanji=癸亥|romaji=mizunoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=guǐhài|w=kuei-hai|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ xaɪ̯|y=gwai2 hoi6|j=gwai2 hoi6|ci=kʷɐi hɐi|mc=kjwɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ɢəʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Pig also known as 癸亥''' (mizu no toi, kisui no inoshishi, kigai) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Pig (癸亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: kigai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyehae (계해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Hợi
<!-- == * Yin Water Pig (癸亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのといのしし (mizunoto-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きかのいのしし (kika-no-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きがい (kigai) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyehae ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Hợi

[[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904914]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Pig [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Pig|kanji=癸亥|romaji=mizunoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=guǐhài|w=kuei-hai|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ xaɪ̯|y=gwai2 hoi6|j=gwai2 hoi6|ci=kʷɐi hɐi|mc=kjwɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ɢəʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Pig also known as 癸亥''' (mizu no toi, kisui no inoshishi, kigai) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Pig (癸亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: kigai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyehae (계해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Hợi

[[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Pig|2=ja|癸亥|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Pig (癸亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: kigai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyehae (계해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Hợi

whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Watervark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-hâi]][[de:Wasser-Schwein]][[hak:Kui-hoi]][[ja:癸亥]][[ko:계해]][[vi:Quý Hợi]][[za:Gveiqhaih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-hāi]][[zh-yue:癸亥]][[zh:癸亥]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904914]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Pig [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Pig|kanji=癸亥|romaji=mizunoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=guǐhài|w=kuei-hai|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ xaɪ̯|y=gwai2 hoi6|j=gwai2 hoi6|ci=kʷɐi hɐi|mc=kjwɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ɢəʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Pig also known as 癸亥''' (mizu no toi, kisui no inoshishi, kigai) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Pig (癸亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: kigai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyehae (계해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Hợi

whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Pig (癸亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: kigai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyehae (계해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Hợi

whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Pig (癸亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: kigai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyehae (계해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Hợi

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Pig (癸亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: kigai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyehae (계해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Hợi
<!-- == * Yin Water Pig (癸亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのといのしし (mizunoto-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きかのいのしし (kika-no-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きがい (kigai) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyehae ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Hợi
--> ==Years of Yin Water Pig== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 3 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Water Pig (癸亥)'s years table''' |- ! AD|ja|2943年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2943|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2943 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |} ==Months of Yin Water Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Pig (癸亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: kigai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyehae (계해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Hợi
<!-- == * Yin Water Pig (癸亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのといのしし (mizunoto-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きかのいのしし (kika-no-inoshishi) ***Onyomi: きがい (kigai) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyehae ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Hợi

AD|ja|2943年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2943|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2943 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |} ==Months of Yin Water Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto
