[[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Pig (癸亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: kigai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyehae (계해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Hợi

AD|ja|2943年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2943|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2943 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |} ==Months of Yin Water Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by [[:en:Wood Rat|Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig AD|ja|2943年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2943|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2943 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |} ==Months of Yin Water Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Pig|kanji=癸亥|romaji=mizunoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=guǐhài|w=kuei-hai|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ xaɪ̯|y=gwai2 hoi6|j=gwai2 hoi6|ci=kʷɐi hɐi|mc=kjwɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ɢəʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Pig also known as 癸亥''' (mizu no toi, kisui no inoshishi, kigai) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wood Rat|en|Wood Rat|WD=Q1190890|lt=Yang Wood Rat}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐhài
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 hoi6
**  Japanese:

***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-inoshishi
***Onyomi 1: kigai
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyehae (계해)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Hợi

==Months of Yin Water Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Water Pig==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Pig|kanji=癸亥|romaji=mizunoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=guǐhài|w=kuei-hai|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ xaɪ̯|y=gwai2 hoi6|j=gwai2 hoi6|ci=kʷɐi hɐi|mc=kjwɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ɢəʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Pig also known as 癸亥''' (mizu no toi, kisui no inoshishi, kigai) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wood Rat|en|Wood Rat|WD=Q1190890|lt=Yang Wood Rat}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this ==Months of Yin Water Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Water Pig==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Pig|kanji=癸亥|romaji=mizunoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=guǐhài|w=kuei-hai|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ xaɪ̯|y=gwai2 hoi6|j=gwai2 hoi6|ci=kʷɐi hɐi|mc=kjwɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ɢəʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Pig also known as 癸亥''' (mizu no toi, kisui no inoshishi, kigai) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wood Rat|en|Wood Rat|WD=Q1190890|lt=Yang Wood Rat}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 hoi6
**  Japanese:

***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-inoshishi
***Onyomi 1: kigai
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyehae (계해)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Hợi

==Months of Yin Water Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Water Pig==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Pig|kanji=癸亥|romaji=mizunoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=guǐhài|w=kuei-hai|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ xaɪ̯|y=gwai2 hoi6|j=gwai2 hoi6|ci=kʷɐi hɐi|mc=kjwɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ɢəʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Pig also known as 癸亥''' (mizu no toi, kisui no inoshishi, kigai) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wood Rat|en|Wood Rat|WD=Q1190890|lt=Yang Wood Rat}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Pig (癸亥)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐhài
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 hoi6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-i
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-inoshishi
***Onyomi 1: kigai
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyehae (계해)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Hợi

==Years of Yin Water Pig==

==Months of Yin Water Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Water Pig==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Pig|kanji=癸亥|romaji=mizunoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=guǐhài|w=kuei-hai|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ xaɪ̯|y=gwai2 hoi6|j=gwai2 hoi6|ci=kʷɐi hɐi|mc=kjwɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ɢəʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Pig also known as 癸亥''' (mizu no toi, kisui no inoshishi, kigai) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wood Rat|en|Wood Rat|WD=Q1190890|lt=Yang Wood Rat}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Pig (癸亥)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐhài
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 hoi6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-i
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-inoshishi
***Onyomi 1: kigai
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyehae (계해)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Hợi

<!--

***Onyomi: きかのいのしし (kika-no-inoshishi)
***Onyomi: きがい (kigai)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyehae
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Hợi

==Years of Yin Water Pig==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 3 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=year}} of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

==Months of Yin Water Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Water Pig==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Pig|kanji=癸亥|romaji=mizunoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=guǐhài|w=kuei-hai|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ xaɪ̯|y=gwai2 hoi6|j=gwai2 hoi6|ci=kʷɐi hɐi|mc=kjwɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ɢəʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Pig also known as 癸亥''' (mizu no toi, kisui no inoshishi, kigai) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wood Rat|en|Wood Rat|WD=Q1190890|lt=Yang Wood Rat|1=Yang Wood Rat}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Pig (癸亥)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐhài
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 hoi6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-i
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-inoshishi
***Onyomi 1: kigai
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyehae (계해)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Hợi

==Years of Yin Water Pig==

==Months of Yin Water Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October|1=October}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter|1=Lidong}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow|1=Daxue (solar term)}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Water Pig==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Pig|kanji=癸亥|romaji=mizunoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=guǐhài|w=kuei-hai|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ xaɪ̯|y=gwai2 hoi6|j=gwai2 hoi6|ci=kʷɐi hɐi|mc=kjwɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ɢəʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Pig also known as 癸亥''' (mizu no toi, kisui no inoshishi, kigai) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wood Rat|en|Wood Rat|WD=Q1190890|lt=Yang Wood Rat|1=Yang Wood Rat}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 hoi6
**  Japanese:

***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-inoshishi
***Onyomi 1: kigai
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyehae (계해)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Hợi

==Months of Yin Water Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October|1=October}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter|1=Lidong}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow|1=Daxue (solar term)}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Water Pig==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Pig|kanji=癸亥|romaji=mizunoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=guǐhài|w=kuei-hai|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ xaɪ̯|y=gwai2 hoi6|j=gwai2 hoi6|ci=kʷɐi hɐi|mc=kjwɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ɢəʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Pig also known as 癸亥''' (mizu no toi, kisui no inoshishi, kigai) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wood Rat|en|Wood Rat|WD=Q1190890|lt=Yang Wood Rat|1=Yang Wood Rat}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Hợi

==Months of Yin Water Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October|1=October}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter|1=Lidong}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow|1=Daxue (solar term)}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Water Pig==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Pig|kanji=癸亥|romaji=mizunoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=guǐhài|w=kuei-hai|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ xaɪ̯|y=gwai2 hoi6|j=gwai2 hoi6|ci=kʷɐi hɐi|mc=kjwɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ɢəʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Pig also known as 癸亥''' (mizu no toi, kisui no inoshishi, kigai) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wood Rat|en|Wood Rat|WD=Q1190890|lt=Yang Wood Rat|1=Yang Wood Rat}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Pig (癸亥)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐhài
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 hoi6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-i
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-inoshishi
***Onyomi 1: kigai
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyehae (계해)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Hợi

==Years of Yin Water Pig==

==Months of Yin Water Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October|1=October}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter|1=Lidong}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow|1=Daxue (solar term)}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Water Pig==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.
